span.p: Property Enters V&V System

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
CP01: Obtain WARMS Database
& Perform Audit
---
Compare WARMS vs V&V DB
Identify new records
Detect ownership changes

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
CP02: Identify Unregistered
Users
---
GIS analysis on satellite imagery
Flag unregistered water use

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
CP03: V&V Database Analysis
Record Status Quo
---
Categorise: completed,
verification-only, in-process,
not started

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
CP04: Project Inception
Report
---
Scope, totals, status
breakdown, resource plan

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
CP05: Public Participation
Session 1
---
Large-scale public launch
Media, industry, agriculture

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
CP06: Evaluate WARMS
Registration Information
---
Identify activities: Taking,
Storing, Industrial, SFRA

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
[AMENDED 2026-03-24] Water User Input
Water users may submit information
via portal at any control point
where DWS lacks required data

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
CP07: Obtain Supportive
Spatial Information
---
SG boundaries, satellite
imagery 1996-1999 + current

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
CP08: Obtain Other
Supportive Information
---
Field surveys, GWCA,
Irrigation Board, Section 9B

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
CP09: Property & Source
Evaluation
---
Title deeds, SG diagram,
owner verification, source eval

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
CP10: Evaluate Additional
Information
---
Permits, Section 32/33,
transfers, court decisions

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
CP11: GIS Analysis &
Field Digitising
---
Overlay boundaries on imagery
Digitise fields & dams
Calculate hectares

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
CP12: Field & Crop +
SAPWAT Modelling
---
Crop data per field
SAPWAT volume calculation

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
CP13: Calculate ELU /
Lawful / Unlawful
---
All scenarios: Proclamation,
Existing, Lawful, Unlawful,
Registered, Present

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
CP14: Update V&V
Database
---
Capture all calculated data
Link to WARMS reg number

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
CP15: Calculate Dam
Volumes
---
Wall x Fetch x Depth x Factor
or Area x Depth x Factor

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
CP16: Calculate Stream
Flow Reduction
---
SFRA hectares & volumes
Qualify vs Current period

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
CP17: Public Participation
Session 2
---
Field visits per small area
Individual sessions with users
Present application letters

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
CP18: Field Visit &
Letter Dissemination
---
Present findings to users
Issue Letter 1

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
CP19: Section 35
Correspondence
---
Post letters to non-attendees
Track responses & deadlines

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
CP20: Section 35 Process
Tracking
---
Letter state machine
Escalation paths

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
CP21: Project Control
& Reporting
---
Progress reports
Letter tracking summary

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: V&V Complete for Property
